entity.label: Beeri
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The father of Judith, one of the wives of Esau (Gen. 26:34), the same as Adah (Gen. 36:2).

nodes.label: Beeri
nodes.description: The father of Judith, one of the wives of Esau (Gen. 26:34), the same as Adah (Gen. 36:2).

nodes.label: Aholibamah
nodes.description: Jewess, the daughter of Beeri the Hittite, and one of Esau’s wives (Gen. 26:34), elsewhere called Aholibamah (36:2-14).

verses.text: And Esau was forty years old when he took to wife Judith the daughter of Beeri the Hittite, and Bashemath the daughter of Elon the Hittite:
